chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-550 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.2716/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.2505/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection 4. For hearing of CMA No.2506/2025 (Ex/A) 5. For hearing of main case 30-4-2025 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1&2. Urgent Application (CMA No.2716/2025) is granted while another urgent application (CMA No.2505/2025) is disposed of being infructuous. 3 to5. The petitioner being civil servant has approached this Court though remedy is available to her to approach before the Service tribunal. This petition is barred by Article 212 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, hence, is hereby dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
